news.t: This ETF plays defensively within growth stocks. Here's how it's faring better than the S&P 500.
TCW to Change Listing Exchange of ETFs to NYSE
TCW Completes Conversion of Two Mutual Funds to ETFs

holdings.infoBox: GRW is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 8.33%, TransDigm Group at 8.04%, Alphabet at 7.83%, GE Aerospace at 6.74%, and ASML Holding at 5.13%.

overview.description: The TCW Durable Growth ETF (GRW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in US and non-US companies the adviser sees as benefiting from technological, market, and consumer-driven transformation. It emphasizes durable growth traits and large-cap exposure. GRW was launched on May 6, 2024 and is issued by TCW.

data.title: This ETF plays defensively within growth stocks. Here's how it's faring better than the S&P 500.
data.text: Investors with an appetite for growth stocks can play defensively within the category by focusing more on high-quality stocks beyond Big Tech.
